metadata.title: 10th Pass Triple-Check: Comprehensive Verification of 27 Code Fixes + MLflow 413 + FinOps Migration
metadata.approach: VERIFY-ONLY: read source, read tests, run tests. No new code.
metadata.verification: Every task has: (1) source file check, (2) test file check, (3) test run command

prior-plans.plan: 12 original tasks (T1-T12) — loss NaN, MLflow retry, empty guards, checkpoint safety, observability, consistency
15 double-check tasks (T1-T15) — FP16 dtype, HL1ACE NaN, AuxCalib isolation, OOM diagnostics, all-background, memory, Betti matching
MLflow 413 root cause: 5 layers (dependency, Docker, Pulumi, file_mounts, runtime)
FinOps: migrate all GCP resources from europe-north1 to europe-west4

context.summary:
This plan is a PURE VERIFICATION pass. It creates zero new code. It reads existing source files, reads existing test files, and runs existing tests to confirm all prior fixes are in place and passing.
Three categories: Category 1: 27 code fixes from the 10th pass + double-check plans Category 2: MLflow 413 fix (6 layers) Category 3: FinOps europe-west4 migration
Every verification task follows the same structure: 1. SOURCE CHECK — read the source file, confirm the fix/guard exists 2. TEST CHECK — read the test file, confirm coverage exists 3. RUN — execute the test file, confirm it passes 4. VERDICT — PASS/FAIL with specific evidence
context.cold-start-instructions:
To execute this plan from a fresh session:
1. Read THIS file completely 2. Read CLAUDE.md (project rules) 3. Invoke /self-learning-iterative-coder 4. Execute each verification task in order 5. Report a PASS/FAIL summary table at the end
This is a READ-ONLY verification plan. If any check FAILS, do NOT fix it inline — create a GitHub issue with the failure details and continue to the next task. The goal is a complete inventory of what works and what does not.

category.name: 10th Pass Original — 12 Code Fixes
category.description: Verify ALL 12 fixes from run-debug-factorial-experiment-report-10th-pass-improvement.xml. Grouped by theme for efficient verification.

task.title: VERIFY: NaN loss guard for cbdice_cldice (VesselCompoundLoss)

source-check.what: Lines ~120-125: isnan/isinf guard on cldice_loss in VesselCompoundLoss.forward()
source-check.command: uv run python -c " import ast, pathlib src = pathlib.Path('src/minivess/pipeline/loss_functions.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8') tree = ast.parse(src) found = any('isnan' in ast.dump(node) for node in ast.walk(tree) if isinstance(node, ast.Call)) print('NaN guard found:', found) "

test-check.what: Tests for cbdice_cldice with all-background labels producing finite loss
test-check.command: uv run python -c " import ast, pathlib src = pathlib.Path('tests/v2/unit/test_loss_nan_check.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8') tree = ast.parse(src) funcs = [n.name for n in ast.walk(tree) if isinstance(n, (ast.FunctionDef, ast.AsyncFunctionDef))] nan_tests = [f for f in funcs if 'nan' in f.lower() or 'all_background' in f.lower() or 'cbdice' in f.lower()] print('NaN-related tests:', nan_tests) print('Count:', len(nan_tests)) "
test-check.expected: At least 1 test covering NaN/all-background for cbdice_cldice

task.title: VERIFY: SkeletonRecallLoss warns on empty skeleton fallback

source-check.what: Warning logged when skeletonize() returns empty and fallback to full foreground mask
source-check.command: uv run python -c " import pathlib src = pathlib.Path('src/minivess/pipeline/vendored_losses/skeleton_recall.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8') has_warning = 'logger.warning' in src and ('skeleton' in src.lower() and 'empty' in src.lower() or 'fallback' in src.lower()) print('Skeleton empty warning found:', has_warning) "

test-check.what: Tests for thin structure warning and normal structure no-warning

task.title: VERIFY: Topology loss edge case tests (all-zero weights, ccDice, BettiLoss)

source-check.what: Parametrized edge case tests for topology losses
source-check.command: uv run pytest tests/v2/unit/losses/test_topology_loss_edge_cases.py --collect-only -q 2>&1 | head -20
source-check.expected: Multiple tests collected covering edge cases

test-check.what: Same file — it IS the test

task.title: VERIFY: load_checkpoint rejects >50% missing keys

source-check.what: Lines ~497-507: Pre-check for gross key mismatch before load_state_dict
source-check.command: uv run python -c " import pathlib src = pathlib.Path('src/minivess/ensemble/builder.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8') has_guard = '50%' in src or '0.5' in src has_missing = 'missing' in src.lower() and 'keys' in src.lower() print('50% key mismatch guard found:', has_guard and has_missing) "

test-check.what: Tests for mismatched keys raises and valid keys succeeds

task.title: VERIFY: _average_checkpoints warns on key mismatch, raises on empty

source-check.what: Lines ~658-688: Empty list guard + key mismatch warning in _average_checkpoints
source-check.command: uv run python -c " import pathlib src = pathlib.Path('src/minivess/orchestration/flows/post_training_flow.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8') has_empty_guard = 'Cannot average 0' in src or 'empty' in src.lower() has_key_mismatch = 'key mismatch' in src.lower() or 'not in all folds' in src.lower() print('Empty guard:', has_empty_guard) print('Key mismatch warning:', has_key_mismatch) "

test-check.what: Tests for empty list raises, mismatched keys warns, single checkpoint identity

phase.name: Training Flow Guards (T2, T3, T5, T11)

task.title: VERIFY: MLflow resume retry with checkpoint fallback

source-check.what: Lines ~322-358: Retry loop (3 attempts) for mlflow.get_run with checkpoint fallback
source-check.command: uv run python -c " import pathlib src = pathlib.Path('src/minivess/orchestration/flows/train_flow.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8') has_retry = 'attempt' in src and ('range(3)' in src or 'retry' in src.lower()) has_fallback = 'epoch_latest' in src and 'exists()' in src print('Retry logic found:', has_retry) print('Checkpoint fallback found:', has_fallback) "
source-check.expected: Both retry and fallback found: True

test-check.what: Tests for MLflow unreachable with/without checkpoint

task.title: VERIFY: Empty folds_to_run and empty dataloaders raise ValueError

source-check.what: Line ~850-852: Guard on empty folds_to_run raising ValueError
source-check.command: uv run python -c " import pathlib src = pathlib.Path('src/minivess/orchestration/flows/train_flow.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8') has_folds_guard = 'folds_to_run is empty' in src or ('not folds_to_run' in src and 'raise' in src) print('Folds guard found:', has_folds_guard) "

test-check.what: Tests for empty folds and empty dataloaders raising ValueError

task.title: VERIFY: Calibration metrics handle all-zero/all-one labels

source-check.what: Lines ~83-90: Guard on single-class labels before LogisticRegression.fit()
source-check.command: uv run python -c " import pathlib src = pathlib.Path('src/minivess/pipeline/calibration_metrics.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8') has_guard = 'unique' in src.lower() and ('single-class' in src.lower() or 'len(unique' in src) print('Single-class guard found:', has_guard) "

test-check.what: Tests for all-zero, all-one, and normal case

task.title: VERIFY: Legacy POST_TRAINING_METHOD (singular) removed

source-check.what: Only POST_TRAINING_METHODS (plural) exists, no singular fallback
source-check.command: uv run python -c " import pathlib src = pathlib.Path('src/minivess/orchestration/flows/train_flow.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8') # Check that singular form does not appear as env var key # Plural form should exist, singular should NOT lines = src.split('\n') singular_refs = [i+1 for i, l in enumerate(lines) if 'POST_TRAINING_METHOD\"' in l and 'METHODS' not in l] plural_refs = [i+1 for i, l in enumerate(lines) if 'POST_TRAINING_METHODS' in l] print('Singular POST_TRAINING_METHOD references (should be 0):', len(singular_refs), singular_refs) print('Plural POST_TRAINING_METHODS references:', len(plural_refs)) "

test-check.what: Tests that singular form is absent and plural is parsed correctly

task.title: VERIFY: JSONL structured training event logging

source-check.what: StructuredEventLogger class with log_event() and update_heartbeat() methods
source-check.command: uv run python -c " import pathlib src = pathlib.Path('src/minivess/observability/structured_logging.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8') has_class = 'StructuredEventLogger' in src has_log_event = 'def log_event' in src has_heartbeat = 'def update_heartbeat' in src print('StructuredEventLogger class:', has_class) print('log_event method:', has_log_event) print('update_heartbeat method:', has_heartbeat) "

test-check.what: Tests for JSONL writing, heartbeat, and no-op without dir

task.title: VERIFY: Docker image GAR path consistency tests

source-check.what: Tests that verify GAR image path is consistent across SkyPilot YAMLs and configs
source-check.command: uv run pytest tests/v2/unit/deployment/test_docker_image_consistency.py --collect-only -q 2>&1 | head -20

test-check.what: Same file — it IS the test

task.title: VERIFY: GCS bucket name consistency tests

source-check.what: Tests that verify GCS bucket names are consistent across all config files
source-check.command: uv run pytest tests/v2/unit/deployment/test_gcs_bucket_consistency.py --collect-only -q 2>&1 | head -20

test-check.what: Same file — it IS the test

category.name: Double-Check Plan — 15 Additional Fixes
category.description: Verify ALL 15 fixes from run-debug-factorial-experiment-report-10th-pass-improvement-double-check.xml. Grouped by theme for efficient verification.

task.title: VERIFY: GraphTopologyLoss FP16 accumulator forced to float32

source-check.what: Line ~540: Accumulator uses dtype=torch.float32 (not logits.dtype)
source-check.expected: Accumulator uses float32 or defaults to float32 (no logits.dtype)

test-check.what: Tests for FP16 input producing float32 output across all compound losses

task.title: VERIFY: HL1ACELoss handles all-empty bins (extreme logits)

source-check.what: NaN guard on ace_per_bc after torch.nanmean — replaces NaN with 0.0
source-check.command: uv run python -c " import pathlib src = pathlib.Path('src/minivess/pipeline/calibration_losses.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8') has_nan_guard = 'torch.where' in src and 'isnan' in src and 'zeros_like' in src has_nanmean = 'nanmean' in src print('nanmean used:', has_nanmean) print('NaN guard (torch.where + isnan + zeros_like):', has_nan_guard) "
source-check.expected: Both nanmean and NaN guard found: True

test-check.what: Tests for extreme logits (all-empty bins) and uniform predictions
test-check.expected: Tests covering extreme logits edge cases

task.title: VERIFY: AuxCalibCompoundLoss NaN isolation (seg + calib independent)

source-check.what: Lines ~579-584: NaN guard on seg_val and calib_val independently, ValueError if both NaN
source-check.command: uv run python -c " import pathlib src = pathlib.Path('src/minivess/pipeline/loss_functions.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8') has_seg_nan_guard = 'seg_nan' in src or ('isfinite' in src and 'seg_val' in src) has_both_nan = 'both' in src.lower() or ('seg_nan and calib_nan' in src) print('Seg NaN guard:', has_seg_nan_guard) print('Both-NaN ValueError:', has_both_nan) "

test-check.what: Tests for seg NaN, calib NaN, both NaN, and normal case

task.title: VERIFY: ClassBalancedDiceLoss all-background/all-foreground edge cases

source-check.what: Tests verifying finite loss/gradient for all-background and all-foreground labels
source-check.command: uv run pytest tests/v2/unit/losses/test_class_balanced_dice_edge_cases.py --collect-only -q 2>&1 | head -20

test-check.what: Same file

task.title: VERIFY: All compound losses survive all-background data

source-check.what: Tests all 5+ compound losses with all-background labels are finite
source-check.command: uv run pytest tests/v2/unit/losses/test_compound_loss_all_background.py --collect-only -q 2>&1 | head -20
source-check.expected: At least 5 tests (one per compound loss)

test-check.what: Same file

task.title: VERIFY: OOM diagnostic path tested (CPU device, re-raise)

source-check.what: Tests for OOM diagnostics on CPU device, PyTorch 2.x detection, re-raise
source-check.command: uv run pytest tests/v2/unit/pipeline/test_trainer_oom_diagnostics.py --collect-only -q 2>&1 | head -20

test-check.what: Same file

task.title: VERIFY: resolve_checkpoint_paths_from_contract loud failure on empty

source-check.what: Guard: empty result with parent_run_id raises ValueError
source-check.command: uv run python -c " import pathlib src = pathlib.Path('src/minivess/orchestration/flows/post_training_flow.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8') has_guard = 'resolve_checkpoint_paths' in src and 'found 0 checkpoints' in src print('Empty checkpoint guard found:', has_guard) "

test-check.what: Tests for None parent returns empty, missing dirs raises, valid paths work

task.title: VERIFY: _discover_runs empty experiment warns loudly

source-check.what: Tests for missing experiment warning, zero runs warning, valid runs
source-check.command: uv run pytest tests/v2/unit/orchestration/test_analysis_flow_empty_runs.py --collect-only -q 2>&1 | head -20

test-check.what: Same file

task.title: VERIFY: Cost estimate handles zero epochs, zero rate, zero folds

source-check.what: Tests for zero epoch_seconds, zero hourly rate, zero folds, normal case
source-check.command: uv run pytest tests/v2/unit/observability/test_cost_estimate_edge_cases.py --collect-only -q 2>&1 | head -20

test-check.what: Same file

task.title: VERIFY: _average_checkpoints handles corrupt files with clear error

source-check.what: try/except around torch.load in _average_checkpoints with diagnostic message
source-check.command: uv run python -c " import pathlib src = pathlib.Path('src/minivess/orchestration/flows/post_training_flow.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8') has_try_except = 'Failed to load checkpoint' in src or 'corrupt' in src.lower() print('Corrupt checkpoint guard found:', has_try_except) "

test-check.what: Tests for corrupt file raises clear error, one corrupt + one valid

task.title: VERIFY: BettiLoss gradient edge cases (min spatial dims, all-zero predictions)

source-check.what: Tests for minimum spatial dims (2x2x2), all-zero predictions, perfect match
source-check.command: uv run pytest tests/v2/unit/losses/test_betti_loss_gradient_edge_cases.py --collect-only -q 2>&1 | head -20
source-check.expected: At least 3 edge case tests collected

test-check.what: Same file

task.title: VERIFY: SkeletonRecallLoss CPU-GPU transfer no memory leak

source-check.what: Tests for detached skeleton, multiple forward passes no leak, batch size scaling
source-check.command: uv run pytest tests/v2/unit/losses/test_skeleton_recall_memory.py --collect-only -q 2>&1 | head -20

test-check.what: Same file

task.title: VERIFY: BettiMatchingLoss gudhi availability and proxy fallback warning

source-check.what: Tests for gudhi availability, differentiability, all-background, proxy warning
source-check.command: uv run pytest tests/v2/unit/test_betti_matching_loss.py --collect-only -q 2>&1 | head -20
source-check.expected: Tests covering gudhi and proxy paths

test-check.what: Same file

task.title: VERIFY: Cross-flow EXPERIMENT_NAME consistency

source-check.what: Tests that train_flow, analysis_flow, and SkyPilot YAMLs use consistent experiment names
source-check.command: uv run pytest tests/v2/unit/orchestration/test_cross_flow_experiment_name.py --collect-only -q 2>&1 | head -20

test-check.what: Same file

task.title: VERIFY: ExperimentTracker handles nonexistent files and no active run

source-check.what: Tests for nonexistent file, no active run, valid file, start_run creates experiment
source-check.command: uv run pytest tests/v2/unit/observability/test_tracker_error_paths.py --collect-only -q 2>&1 | head -20
source-check.expected: At least 3 error path tests collected

test-check.what: Same file

category.name: MLflow 413 Fix — CRITICAL
category.description:
The MLflow 413 "Request Entity Too Large" error persisted across 10 experiment passes. Root cause: training Docker container lacked google-cloud-storage, so MLflow fell back to HTTP proxy through Cloud Run (32 MB limit).
This category verifies ALL 6 layers of the fix. Each layer is independently necessary — failure of any single layer means the 413 will recur.
Source: mlflow-constant-issue-with-413-mlflow-and-claude-refusal-to-fix.xml

task.title: VERIFY: google-cloud-storage in main dependencies (pyproject.toml)
task.description: google-cloud-storage must be in [project.dependencies] (NOT optional extras). Docker base image uses uv sync --frozen --no-dev, which only installs main deps. If it is in [project.optional-dependencies].sky, the Docker image will NOT have it.

source-check.what: google-cloud-storage in [project.dependencies] section
source-check.command: uv run python -c " import tomllib, pathlib data = tomllib.loads(pathlib.Path('pyproject.toml').read_text(encoding='utf-8')) main_deps = data.get('project', {}).get('dependencies', []) gcs_in_main = any('google-cloud-storage' in d for d in main_deps) print('google-cloud-storage in main dependencies:', gcs_in_main) if gcs_in_main: matching = [d for d in main_deps if 'google-cloud-storage' in d] print(' Entry:', matching[0]) else: # Check if it is in optional deps (wrong location) opt = data.get('project', {}).get('optional-dependencies', {}) for group, deps in opt.items(): if any('google-cloud-storage' in d for d in deps): print(f' WARNING: found in optional [{group}] — NOT in main deps!') "

test-check.what: Test verifying GCS artifact store configuration

task.title: VERIFY: --no-serve-artifacts in Dockerfile.mlflow-gcp
task.description: The MLflow tracking server must run with --no-serve-artifacts so clients upload directly to GCS (bypassing Cloud Run's 32 MB body limit).

source-check.what: CMD or ENTRYPOINT includes --no-serve-artifacts flag
source-check.command: uv run python -c " import pathlib src = pathlib.Path('deployment/docker/Dockerfile.mlflow-gcp').read_text(encoding='utf-8') has_flag = '--no-serve-artifacts' in src print('--no-serve-artifacts flag present:', has_flag) lines = [l.strip() for l in src.split('\n') if '--no-serve-artifacts' in l] for l in lines: print(' Line:', l) "

test-check.what: Test verifying Dockerfile.mlflow-gcp contains --no-serve-artifacts

task.title: VERIFY: MLFLOW_DEFAULT_ARTIFACT_ROOT=gs:// in Pulumi __main__.py
task.description: The Pulumi code must set MLFLOW_DEFAULT_ARTIFACT_ROOT to a GCS bucket on the Cloud Run service environment variables.

source-check.what: MLFLOW_DEFAULT_ARTIFACT_ROOT env var set to gs:// URL
source-check.command: uv run python -c " import pathlib src = pathlib.Path('deployment/pulumi/gcp/__main__.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8') has_artifact_root = 'MLFLOW_DEFAULT_ARTIFACT_ROOT' in src has_gs = 'gs://' in src and 'mlflow-artifacts' in src print('MLFLOW_DEFAULT_ARTIFACT_ROOT env var:', has_artifact_root) print('GCS artifact root (gs://):', has_gs) "

test-check.what: May include Pulumi config verification

task.title: VERIFY: Cloud Run deployed and live (runtime check)
task.description:
The Cloud Run service must be DEPLOYED with the updated configuration. Code changes without deployment = no fix. This checks LIVE infrastructure.
NOTE: This may fail if Cloud Run is disabled (enable_cloud_run=false in Pulumi). In that case, the verification is: confirm enable_cloud_run is intentionally false and document why.

source-check.what: Check if enable_cloud_run flag exists and its current value
source-check.command: uv run python -c " import pathlib src = pathlib.Path('deployment/pulumi/gcp/__main__.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8') has_enable_flag = 'enable_cloud_run' in src print('enable_cloud_run flag in Pulumi code:', has_enable_flag) lines = [l.strip() for l in src.split('\n') if 'enable_cloud_run' in l] for l in lines[:5]: print(' ', l) "

test-check.what: Runtime check — query GCP for Cloud Run service status
test-check.command: gcloud run services list --project=minivess-mlops --region=europe-west4 --format="table(SERVICE,REGION,URL,LAST_DEPLOYED)" 2>&1 || echo "Cloud Run not deployed or gcloud not configured"
test-check.expected: Either: Cloud Run service listed in europe-west4, OR: intentionally disabled

run.command: uv run python -c " import tomllib, pathlib # Check Pulumi stack config for enable_cloud_run dev_yaml = pathlib.Path('deployment/pulumi/gcp/Pulumi.dev.yaml') if dev_yaml.exists(): import yaml data = yaml.safe_load(dev_yaml.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) config = data.get('config', {}) enable_cr = config.get('minivess:enable_cloud_run', 'NOT SET') print('enable_cloud_run in Pulumi.dev.yaml:', enable_cr) else: print('Pulumi.dev.yaml not found') "
run.expected: enable_cloud_run value documented (true = deployed, false = intentionally disabled)

task.title: VERIFY: file_mounts REMOVED from ALL SkyPilot training YAMLs
task.description: file_mounts to gs://minivess-mlops-checkpoints were a competing persistence mechanism that violates the mlflow_only_artifact_contract. They must be removed from all training SkyPilot YAMLs.

source-check.what: No active file_mounts in any training SkyPilot YAML
source-check.command: uv run python -c " import yaml, pathlib, sys skypilot_dir = pathlib.Path('deployment/skypilot') training_yamls = ['train_factorial.yaml', 'train_production.yaml', 'train_hpo.yaml', 'smoke_test_gcp.yaml'] all_clean = True for name in training_yamls: path = skypilot_dir / name if not path.exists(): print(f' {name}: FILE NOT FOUND') continue data = yaml.safe_load(path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) has_file_mounts = 'file_mounts' in (data or {}) if has_file_mounts: print(f' {name}: FAIL — file_mounts still present: {data[\"file_mounts\"]}') all_clean = False else: # Also check raw text for commented-out file_mounts (OK) vs active raw = path.read_text(encoding='utf-8') active_mounts = [l for l in raw.split('\n') if 'file_mounts' in l and not l.strip().startswith('#')] if active_mounts: print(f' {name}: FAIL — uncommented file_mounts line: {active_mounts}') all_clean = False else: print(f' {name}: PASS — no active file_mounts') print() print('All training YAMLs clean:', all_clean) "

test-check.what: Should include test that no SkyPilot YAML has competing file_mounts

task.title: VERIFY: Runtime — artifact_location uses gs:// (not file:///)
task.description:
The acceptance criterion for the MLflow 413 fix is RUNTIME VERIFIED: an actual experiment's artifact_location starts with gs://.
This requires either: (a) a live MLflow tracking server to query, or (b) a test that verifies the MLflow client would use GCSArtifactRepository when google-cloud-storage is importable.

source-check.what: google-cloud-storage importable in current environment
source-check.command: uv run python -c " try: import google.cloud.storage print('google.cloud.storage importable: True') print('Version:', google.cloud.storage.__version__) except ImportError as e: print('google.cloud.storage importable: False') print('Error:', e) "

test-check.what: Verify MLflow can resolve GCS artifact repository when gcs lib is available
test-check.command: uv run python -c " try: from mlflow.store.artifact.gcs_artifact_repo import GCSArtifactRepository print('GCSArtifactRepository importable: True') except ImportError: print('GCSArtifactRepository importable: False — MLflow will fall back to HTTP proxy!') "

category.name: FinOps Region Migration — europe-west4
category.description:
All GCP resources must be in europe-west4 (Netherlands) for zero egress. March 2026 bill was EUR 89 in egress alone from cross-region Docker pulls.
Source: run-debug-factorial-experiment-11th-pass-finops-execution.xml

task.title: VERIFY: Pulumi config uses europe-west4

source-check.what: gcp:region set to europe-west4
source-check.command: uv run python -c " import yaml, pathlib data = yaml.safe_load(pathlib.Path('deployment/pulumi/gcp/Pulumi.dev.yaml').read_text(encoding='utf-8')) region = data.get('config', {}).get('gcp:region', 'NOT SET') print('Pulumi.dev.yaml gcp:region:', region) print('PASS:', region == 'europe-west4') "

test-check.what: Default region in Pulumi.yaml
test-check.command: uv run python -c " import yaml, pathlib data = yaml.safe_load(pathlib.Path('deployment/pulumi/gcp/Pulumi.yaml').read_text(encoding='utf-8')) template = data.get('template', {}).get('config', {}).get('gcp:region', {}) default = template.get('default', 'NOT SET') if isinstance(template, dict) else template print('Pulumi.yaml default region:', default) "

run.command: uv run python -c " import pathlib src = pathlib.Path('deployment/pulumi/gcp/__main__.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8') # Check the fallback default in __main__.py lines = [l.strip() for l in src.split('\n') if 'europe-west4' in l and 'region' in l.lower()] print('europe-west4 region references in __main__.py:') for l in lines[:5]: print(' ', l) has_old = 'europe-north1' in src print('europe-north1 references remaining:', has_old) "
run.expected: europe-west4 references present, europe-north1 references: False

task.title: VERIFY: configs/registry/gar.yaml uses europe-west4

source-check.what: server and image_prefix use europe-west4-docker.pkg.dev
source-check.command: uv run python -c " import yaml, pathlib data = yaml.safe_load(pathlib.Path('configs/registry/gar.yaml').read_text(encoding='utf-8')) server = data.get('server', 'NOT SET') prefix = data.get('image_prefix', 'NOT SET') print('server:', server) print('image_prefix:', prefix) print('PASS:', 'europe-west4' in server and 'europe-west4' in prefix) "

test-check.what: GAR live check (if gcloud configured)
test-check.command: gcloud artifacts repositories list --project=minivess-mlops --location=europe-west4 --format="table(REPOSITORY,FORMAT,LOCATION)" 2>&1 || echo "gcloud not configured or no repos in europe-west4"

run.expected: All consistency tests PASSED (using europe-west4 GAR path)

task.title: VERIFY: ALL SkyPilot YAMLs reference europe-west4 GAR

source-check.what: All SkyPilot training YAMLs use europe-west4-docker.pkg.dev image_id
source-check.command:
uv run python -c " import yaml, pathlib skypilot_dir = pathlib.Path('deployment/skypilot') yamls_to_check = [ 'train_factorial.yaml', 'train_production.yaml', 'train_hpo.yaml', 'hpo_grid_worker.yaml', 'smoke_test_gcp.yaml', ] all_pass = True for name in yamls_to_check: path = skypilot_dir / name if not path.exists(): print(f' {name}: FILE NOT FOUND') continue raw = path.read_text(encoding='utf-8') data = yaml.safe_load(raw)
# Check image_id resources = data.get('resources', {}) image_id = resources.get('image_id', 'NOT SET') has_ew4 = 'europe-west4' in str(image_id)
# Check for any europe-north1 references has_old = 'europe-north1' in raw
status = 'PASS' if has_ew4 and not has_old else 'FAIL' if status == 'FAIL': all_pass = False print(f' {name}: {status} (image_id has europe-west4: {has_ew4}, has europe-north1: {has_old})')
print() print('All SkyPilot YAMLs use europe-west4:', all_pass) "
source-check.expected: All SkyPilot YAMLs use europe-west4: True

test-check.what: SkyPilot YAML validation tests

task.title: VERIFY: hpo_grid_worker.yaml region field is europe-west4 (was hardcoded europe-north1)

source-check.what: Line ~35: region field (if present) uses europe-west4
source-check.command: uv run python -c " import yaml, pathlib path = pathlib.Path('deployment/skypilot/hpo_grid_worker.yaml') if path.exists(): raw = path.read_text(encoding='utf-8') has_old = 'europe-north1' in raw has_new = 'europe-west4' in raw print('hpo_grid_worker.yaml:') print(' Contains europe-north1:', has_old, '(should be False)') print(' Contains europe-west4:', has_new, '(should be True)') print(' PASS:', not has_old) else: print('hpo_grid_worker.yaml: FILE NOT FOUND') "
source-check.expected: europe-north1: False, europe-west4: True, PASS: True

test-check.what: Covered by V4.03 SkyPilot YAML check

task.title: VERIFY: .sky.yaml uses gcp/europe-west4, cpus 2+

source-check.what: infra: gcp/europe-west4, cpus: 2+
source-check.command: uv run python -c " import yaml, pathlib path = pathlib.Path('.sky.yaml') if path.exists(): data = yaml.safe_load(path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) raw = path.read_text(encoding='utf-8') has_ew4 = 'europe-west4' in raw has_old = 'europe-north1' in raw or 'europe-west1' in raw print('.sky.yaml region check:') print(' Contains europe-west4:', has_ew4) print(' Contains old region:', has_old, '(should be False)') # Check cpus has_2plus = 'cpus: 2+' in raw or \"cpus: '2+'\" in raw print(' cpus: 2+:', has_2plus) print(' PASS:', has_ew4 and not has_old) else: print('.sky.yaml: FILE NOT FOUND') "
source-check.expected: europe-west4: True, old region: False, PASS: True

test-check.what: No specific test file — verified via source check

run.command: echo "No specific test for .sky.yaml — verified via source check above"

phase.name: No Stale europe-north1 in Active Files

task.title: VERIFY: No europe-north1 in ANY active config/deployment file
task.description: Search all active (non-archive, non-doc, non-metalearning) files for europe-north1. Any hit is a potential egress cost regression.

source-check.what: Comprehensive grep for europe-north1 in active files
source-check.expected: PASS: No active files reference europe-north1

test-check.what: FinOps shift-left test suite should catch this

task.title: VERIFY: GCS buckets in europe-west4 (live check)
task.description: Check live GCS bucket locations via gsutil. Buckets are region-immutable — if they are in europe-north1, they must be recreated.

source-check.what: GCS bucket locations via gsutil
source-check.command: gsutil ls -L -b gs://minivess-mlops-dvc-data/ 2>&1 | head -5 || echo "gsutil not configured or bucket does not exist"
source-check.expected: Location constraint: EUROPE-WEST4 (or bucket not yet created)

test-check.command: gsutil ls -L -b gs://minivess-mlops-mlflow-artifacts/ 2>&1 | head -5 || echo "gsutil not configured or bucket does not exist"
test-check.expected: Location constraint: EUROPE-WEST4 (or bucket not yet created)

run.command: gsutil ls -L -b gs://minivess-mlops-checkpoints/ 2>&1 | head -5 || echo "gsutil not configured or bucket does not exist"
run.expected: Location constraint: EUROPE-WEST4 (or bucket not yet created)

task.title: VERIFY: Cloud SQL in europe-west4 (if enabled)

source-check.what: Cloud SQL instance region via gcloud
source-check.command: gcloud sql instances list --project=minivess-mlops --format="table(NAME,REGION,DATABASE_VERSION,STATE)" 2>&1 || echo "No Cloud SQL instances or gcloud not configured"
source-check.expected: Either: instance in europe-west4, OR: no instances (Cloud SQL disabled)

test-check.what: Covered by Pulumi config verification in V4.01

run.command: echo "Cloud SQL region verified via gcloud or Pulumi config"

task.title: VERIFY: Cloud Run in europe-west4 (if enabled)

source-check.what: Cloud Run service region via gcloud
source-check.command: gcloud run services list --project=minivess-mlops --format="table(SERVICE,REGION,URL)" 2>&1 || echo "No Cloud Run services or gcloud not configured"
source-check.expected: Either: service in europe-west4, OR: no services (Cloud Run disabled)

test-check.what: Covered by Pulumi config verification in V4.01

run.command: echo "Cloud Run region verified via gcloud or Pulumi config"

category.name: Batch Verification — Full Test Suite
category.description: After individual verification tasks, run the full staging test suite to confirm no regressions from the combined changes.

task.title: VERIFY: make test-staging passes (all fixes combined)
VERIFY: ruff check passes

run.command: uv run ruff check src/ tests/ 2>&1 | tail -10
run.expected: All checks passed (or specific count with no errors)

task.title: VERIFY: All 10th pass + double-check test files pass in one batch

run.command: uv run pytest \ tests/v2/unit/test_loss_nan_check.py \ tests/v2/unit/losses/test_skeleton_recall_edge_cases.py \ tests/v2/unit/losses/test_topology_loss_edge_cases.py \ tests/v2/unit/ensemble/test_checkpoint_load_safety.py \ tests/v2/unit/orchestration/test_checkpoint_averaging.py \ tests/v2/unit/orchestration/test_spot_resume.py \ tests/v2/unit/orchestration/test_train_flow_empty_guards.py \ tests/v2/unit/test_calibration_edge_cases.py \ tests/v2/unit/orchestration/test_post_training_method_canonical.py \ tests/v2/unit/observability/test_structured_logging.py \ tests/v2/unit/deployment/test_docker_image_consistency.py \ tests/v2/unit/deployment/test_gcs_bucket_consistency.py \ tests/v2/unit/losses/test_compound_loss_fp16.py \ tests/v2/unit/test_hl1ace_loss.py \ tests/v2/unit/losses/test_aux_calib_nan_isolation.py \ tests/v2/unit/losses/test_class_balanced_dice_edge_cases.py \ tests/v2/unit/losses/test_compound_loss_all_background.py \ tests/v2/unit/pipeline/test_trainer_oom_diagnostics.py \ tests/v2/unit/orchestration/test_resolve_checkpoint_paths.py \ tests/v2/unit/orchestration/test_analysis_flow_empty_runs.py \ tests/v2/unit/observability/test_cost_estimate_edge_cases.py \ tests/v2/unit/losses/test_betti_loss_gradient_edge_cases.py \ tests/v2/unit/losses/test_skeleton_recall_memory.py \ tests/v2/unit/test_betti_matching_loss.py \ tests/v2/unit/orchestration/test_cross_flow_experiment_name.py \ tests/v2/unit/observability/test_tracker_error_paths.py \ -v --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -40

task.title: VERIFY: All MLflow + FinOps test files pass

summary-template.description: After executing all verification tasks, fill in this summary table. Each task gets PASS, FAIL, or SKIP (with reason).
summary-template.table: | ID | Task | Category | Verifies | Status | Notes | |----|------|----------|----------|--------|-------| | V1.01 | NaN loss guard cbdice_cldice | 1A | T1 orig | ? | | | V1.02 | SkeletonRecall empty warning | 1A | T6 orig | ? | | | V1.03 | Topology loss edge cases | 1A | T12 orig | ? | | | V1.04 | load_checkpoint >50% mismatch | 1A | T4 orig | ? | | | V1.05 | _average_checkpoints guards | 1A | T7 orig | ? | | | V1.06 | MLflow resume retry | 1A | T2 orig | ? | | | V1.07 | Empty folds_to_run guard | 1A | T3 orig | ? | | | V1.08 | Calibration all-zero labels | 1A | T5 orig | ? | | | V1.09 | POST_TRAINING_METHOD removed | 1A | T11 orig | ? | | | V1.10 | Structured JSONL logging | 1A | T8 orig | ? | | | V1.11 | GAR image consistency | 1A | T9 orig | ? | | | V1.12 | GCS bucket consistency | 1A | T10 orig | ? | | | V2.01 | FP16 accumulator float32 | 1B | T1 DC | ? | | | V2.02 | HL1ACE all-empty bins | 1B | T2 DC | ? | | | V2.03 | AuxCalib NaN isolation | 1B | T3 DC | ? | | | V2.04 | ClassBalancedDice edge cases | 1B | T5 DC | ? | | | V2.05 | Compound loss all-background | 1B | T9 DC | ? | | | V2.06 | OOM diagnostics tested | 1B | T4 DC | ? | | | V2.07 | resolve_checkpoint_paths guard | 1B | T6 DC | ? | | | V2.08 | _discover_runs empty warns | 1B | T7 DC | ? | | | V2.09 | Cost estimate edge cases | 1B | T8 DC | ? | | | V2.10 | Corrupt checkpoint handling | 1B | T10 DC | ? | | | V2.11 | BettiLoss gradient edges | 1B | T11 DC | ? | | | V2.12 | SkeletonRecall memory leak | 1B | T12 DC | ? | | | V2.13 | BettiMatching gudhi/proxy | 1B | T13 DC | ? | | | V2.14 | Cross-flow experiment name | 1B | T14 DC | ? | | | V2.15 | Tracker error paths | 1B | T15 DC | ? | | | V3.01 | GCS in main deps | 2 | MLflow L1 | ? | | | V3.02 | --no-serve-artifacts | 2 | MLflow L2 | ? | | | V3.03 | MLFLOW_DEFAULT_ARTIFACT_ROOT | 2 | MLflow L3 | ? | | | V3.04 | Cloud Run deployed | 2 | MLflow L4 | ? | | | V3.05 | file_mounts removed | 2 | MLflow L5 | ? | | | V3.06 | GCS artifact runtime | 2 | MLflow L6 | ? | | | V4.01 | Pulumi europe-west4 | 3 | FinOps Pulumi | ? | | | V4.02 | GAR europe-west4 | 3 | FinOps GAR | ? | | | V4.03 | SkyPilot YAMLs europe-west4 | 3 | FinOps SkyPilot | ? | | | V4.04 | hpo_grid_worker region | 3 | FinOps HPO | ? | | | V4.05 | .sky.yaml europe-west4 | 3 | FinOps Controller | ? | | | V4.06 | No stale europe-north1 | 3 | FinOps Grep | ? | | | V4.07 | GCS buckets europe-west4 | 3 | FinOps GCS Live | ? | | | V4.08 | Cloud SQL europe-west4 | 3 | FinOps SQL Live | ? | | | V4.09 | Cloud Run europe-west4 | 3 | FinOps CR Live | ? | | | V5.01 | make test-staging | Batch | Full Suite | ? | | | V5.02 | ruff check | Batch | Lint | ? | | | V5.03 | All Cat1 tests batch | Batch | 26 files | ? | | | V5.04 | All Cat2+3 tests batch | Batch | 5 files | ? | |
summary-template.pass-criteria:
LAUNCH GATE for 11th pass: - ALL V1.* tasks: PASS (code fixes verified) - ALL V2.* tasks: PASS (double-check fixes verified) - V3.01-V3.03, V3.05, V3.06: PASS (MLflow 413 code layers) - V3.04: PASS or SKIP with documented reason (Cloud Run may be intentionally disabled) - V4.01-V4.06: PASS (FinOps config verified) - V4.07-V4.09: PASS or SKIP with documented reason (live infra may not be deployed yet) - V5.01: PASS (staging gate) - V5.02: PASS (lint gate) - V5.03-V5.04: PASS (batch tests)
ANY V1.* or V2.* FAIL = BLOCK launch, fix first. ANY V3.01-V3.03 FAIL = BLOCK launch (MLflow will lose checkpoints again). ANY V4.01-V4.06 FAIL = BLOCK launch (egress costs will recur). V4.07-V4.09 SKIP OK if infrastructure not yet deployed (pre-migration).
